title: FLAGS
description: A server + client side mod which adds a number of flags to the game
body:
- **Hi!** This mod is **"Flags"**, to run it you need to dowload Fabric, NeoForge or some other mod runners first, To put flags you need a painting 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**(flags are only 1x1 blocksize)**

</details>

 if you dont have one craft a painting and if you have put it! try a little bit and the flag you want going to be showen 

## **Flags that mod have currently**
- Austria
- Bavaria
- Ireland
- Italy
- China
- Eygpt
- Mexico
